stories.title: WCWS Day 1 is Here — Devon Park Opens Its Doors (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
It's here. 🥎

Devon Park opens its gates today for the 2026 Women's College World Series.

120,000 fans expected. Four games. Eight teams with one goal.

The best college softball in the world starts at Noon ET on ESPN.

#WCWS #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Devon Park. Oklahoma City. 35 years of Women's College World Series history. 🥎

Today, Game 1 tips off at Noon ET on ESPN. Four games. One bracket.

This venue will host the 2028 Olympics.

This is the greatest stage in college softball.

#WCWS #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: WCWS Day 1 Is Here — Devon Park Opens for the 2026 Women's College World Series

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
WCWS Day 1 is Here — Devon Park Opens Its Doors

**Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical):**
- **Imagn Search Terms:** `NiJaree Canady Texas Tech`
- **Text Overlay:**
  - Headline: "IT STARTS TODAY"
  - Subtitle: "WCWS 2026 — DAY 1 / DEVON PARK, OKLAHOMA CITY"
- **Composition Notes:** Use an action shot of a marquee player (Canady pitching delivery or follow-through) as the anchor subject to signal tournament intensity. Dark overlay at the top third for headline legibility. White headline in bold condensed type; subtitle in lighter weight below. The visual goal is "championship moment" — this image leads the Day 1 coverage and should feel electric. If a crowd or stadium shot is available as a secondary layer, use it as a background behind the player cutout.

---

stories.title: Nebraska's Secret Weapon — Jordy Frahm Hits 19 Home Runs Too (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Jordy Frahm: 20-4, 1.14 ERA, 234 strikeouts in the circle.

Also Jordy Frahm: 19 home runs, 1.338 OPS at the plate.

She's not just the 2026 USA Softball Player of the Year.

She might be the most complete player on this stage. 🥎

#Huskers #WCWS #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Nebraska's Jordy Frahm pitches tonight against Arkansas.

When she's not pitching? She's hitting with 19 HRs and a 1.338 OPS.

51-6. 26-game win streak. Only 3 total runs allowed in 5 NCAA postseason games.

This is a special team. 🥎

#Huskers #WCWS #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Nebraska's Secret Weapon — Jordy Frahm Hits 19 Home Runs Too

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Nebraska's Secret Weapon — Jordy Frahm Hits 19 HRs Too

**Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical):**
- **Imagn Search Terms:** `Jordy Frahm Nebraska`
- **Text Overlay:**
  - Headline: "PITCHER. SLUGGER. PLAYER OF THE YEAR."
  - Subtitle: "JORDY FRAHM — NEBRASKA"
- **Composition Notes:** Select an image that shows Frahm either in pitching delivery or at the plate — a dual-action feel is ideal if available. Nebraska scarlet and cream palette. Bold white headline across the upper half; subtitle in gold or cream below. Dark vignette on the sides to focus attention on the subject. If two photos are available (pitching + hitting), consider a split-panel layout.

---

stories.title: NiJaree Canady vs. Mississippi State — The Final Act Begins (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady: 30-5, 0.89 postseason ERA, 1,000+ career Ks, 96 career wins.

She's the No. 2 pick in the AUSL Draft.

Today she faces Mississippi State — a team that just upset No. 1 Oklahoma. 🥎

The final act begins.

#WreckEm #WCWS #NCAASoftball

article.headline: NiJaree Canady vs. Mississippi State — The Final Act Begins at Devon Park

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
NiJaree Canady vs. Mississippi State — The Final Act Begins

**Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical):**
- **Imagn Search Terms:** `NiJaree Canady Texas Tech`
- **Text Overlay:**
  - Headline: "THE FINAL ACT BEGINS"
  - Subtitle: "NIJAREE CANADY — TEXAS TECH / WCWS GAME 1"
- **Composition Notes:** Pitching delivery or post-strikeout celebration preferred. Texas Tech scarlet and black palette. High-contrast treatment — darken background, keep the subject bright. Headline in large bold white condensed type at top. Subtitle in smaller weight below. Optional badge-style stat callout in lower corner: "1,000+ CAREER Ks."

stories.title: The Coaches Who Will Hug at Home Plate — Revelle vs. Deifel (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Nebraska coach Rhonda Revelle and Arkansas coach Courtney Deifel are longtime friends.

They've already said they plan to hug at home plate after tonight's game.

One will advance. One will go home.

That's the WCWS. 9:30 PM ET on ESPN2. 🥎

#Huskers #WPS #WCWS

article.headline: They'll Hug at Home Plate — Revelle, Deifel, and the Human Story Behind Nebraska-Arkansas

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
The Coaches Who Will Hug at Home Plate — Revelle vs. Deifel

**Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical):**
- **Imagn Search Terms:** `Rhonda Revelle Nebraska` / `Courtney Deifel Arkansas`
- **Text Overlay:**
  - Headline: "THEY PLAN TO HUG AT HOME PLATE"
  - Subtitle: "REVELLE vs. DEIFEL / NEBRASKA vs. ARKANSAS"
- **Composition Notes:** If a photo exists of both coaches together, that is the ideal pull. Otherwise use a split-panel: Revelle (Nebraska scarlet) on left, Deifel (Arkansas red) on right, with a thin dividing line or seam graphic in the center. Warm, human tone — no aggressive framing. Headline centered in white bold across the top or bottom. Subtitle below in lighter weight.

---

stories.title: Tennessee's Two All-Americans Enter the Circle (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Tennessee has TWO First-Team All-Americans in the pitching circle. 🔥

Karlyn Pickens: 1.53 ERA, 180 Ks.
Sage Mardjetko: named All-American on May 26.

They face Texas — the team that beat them 2-0 in last year's WCWS semis.

2:30 PM ET. ESPN.

#VolsSoftball #WCWS #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Tennessee's Two All-Americans Enter the Circle — Pickens and Mardjetko Face Texas

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Tennessee's Two All-Americans Enter the Circle

**Social Image (1080×1350, 4:5 vertical):**
- **Imagn Search Terms:** `Karlyn Pickens Tennessee`
- **Text Overlay:**
  - Headline: "TWO ALL-AMERICANS. ONE STAFF."
  - Subtitle: "PICKENS + MARDJETKO / TENNESSEE SOFTBALL"
- **Composition Notes:** Lead with Karlyn Pickens as primary subject given her four All-American honors. Tennessee orange and white palette. Pitching delivery shot preferred — follow-through or release point. Bold white headline across upper third. Subtitle in orange-tinted or light gray below. Optional second frame or inset of Mardjetko if layout allows. Avoid busy backgrounds; clean stadium backdrop works best.
